creator: shoemaker@bluebottle.com
text:
These are the 3/4/5 man tablebases that include pawns.
Tablebases with pawns as one of the pieces are quite large - this port
will take ~5.1G of disk space, compared with ~2G for the no-pawn
tablebases.

Fix:

Finally - A spam blocker that actually works.

X

Xadded to your ~/.craftyrc file:
X
X        egtb
X        cache 12M

XThese are the pawn 3/4/5 tablebases for crafty's endgames.  They take
Xup about 5.1G...
X
XBe warned that all of these togther (both tablebase ports) will eat up
Xaround 7.1 Gigs of your disk space, or 14.2G, if you don't delete the
Xdistfiles (I highly recommend doing this, as these files almost never
Xchange).
X
X// J Shoemaker
